mechanics.text:
EQUIPMENT
Demolltlon Kit: The demolition kit contained in a air- tight case and provides engineer everything to set off a explosion except the explosives themselves The includes enough detonators, blasting cord wire timers  and other triggering mechanisms t0 set dozen simple timed fused explosions or three complex booby traps c8 Blasting Block: C8 the explosive of choice through- out the Inner Sphere, even though it is expensive and hard to come by: C8 plastique, meaning i5 pliable and can be molded into any shape ad affixed t0 almost any surface, It is aiso very stable and can be dropped, even set on fire , witn- out lear 0f exploding It requires special detonator; Satchel Charge: This is essentially bag that contains the equivalent four blocks of C8 and timer, commonly set for 15 seconds Infantry units use satchel charges to cripple vehi: cles and BattleMechs to create new doorways into punker Or tor dozens other Durooses The charge must be physically placed the target, however. potentially opening the soldiers up t0 deadly fire .
Flare Pistol: This pistol, included many survival kits fires small aerial flare designed attract the attention someone up ten kilometers away: These pistols come many different styles_ anywhere from the size of iarge pen t0 small revolver. Though not designed as weapon_ the flare itself does produce a intense flame ad can cause serious damage to an unprotected human;
BPECIALIZED WEAPONS Some weapons dely simple classification. They are meant for limited purposes, often driving their cost up and availability down:
Flamers flarne thrower, or flamer, delivers constant stream Of burning chemicals and can covCr several   hundred square meters in very short order. Extremely effective in a antiper- sonnel role the flamer" primary use I5 as psychological weapon. preying on the nearly universal fear of being burned alive All flamer weapons are incendiary (p. 119}. Man-Pack Flamer:  Soldiers assigned this weapon must carry a encumbering tank on their backs that fuels the flamer itself. With the hit location rules critical hit (hit location roll of 2) strikes the fuel tank and causes explode destroying the weapon and inflicting the flamer" damage as blast   effect (damage type Xl from the soldier as the point of impact; aimed shot can be made against the fuel tank with the same modifiers as head shot.
Miscellaneous Though the following items are technically explosives they each contain some small pyrotechnic charge_ they do not fit into any standard category: Emergency Flares: Designed to simply burn, not explode flares can mark position start fire_ Each will burn for 30 minutes. Because they contain their own oxygen supply: flares will burn heavy rainfall and even underwater.
